content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.25%, Bank Nifty +1.04%, and Auto/Realty leading. India VIX dropped 5% to 17.15 — risk appetite improving. Most of my book is in the green, and the priority now is locking in gains via trailing SLs rather than chasing fresh breakouts late in the session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +8.6% — strong Q4 with 19% PAT beat, AUM growth +15.3%. Trailing SL up to 1048 (above current 1046.35) which is just below VWAP (1054.81). Locks in ~6.5% gain. Target unchanged at 1110 (near 52w high)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Mild pullback -2.6%, but gold thesis (geopolitical, central bank buying, USD weakness) intact. Current SL 119 is appropriate. Defensive hedge in portfolio."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1450.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.8% on stellar Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). Trailing SL from 1445 to 1450 (above breakeven, near VWAP 1454). Stock at 52w high so leaving room to run; target 1500 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6% — thin gain. Current SL 401 already near breakeven. Power demand at record highs, Q4 results May 15 catalyst. Hold with current SL/target intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1750.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6% post Organon acquisition rally. Tighten SL from 1745 to 1750 (above breakeven). Deal carries integration/leverage risk so I want a tight stop. Target 1810 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 320.50,
      "new_target": 330.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%. Trail SL from 319 to 320.50 (breakeven). Stock near 52w high; record peak demand supportive. Target 330 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.0%. Current SL 478 already locks in ~1.9% gain — well above entry. Q4 PAT beat +12.86% YoY, dividend Rs 5.25 announced. Hold with existing SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%. Current SL 615 is at breakeven+. Stock goes ex-dividend Apr 30 (~Rs 11 mechanical drop). After ex-div, SL 615 may trigger but that captures dividend value. Q4 PAT +67% YoY supportive. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY @ 200 still working — stock at 202.68 has run away from limit. Per order hygiene, do not stack a second BUY. Will let pending order remain; if no pullback, it expires."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to lock in ~6.5% gain on strong move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 appropriate; defensive position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1450.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL above breakeven on Q4 beat / 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thin gain; SL already near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1750.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL above breakeven given Organon deal leverage risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 320.50,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 already locks in profit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow; SL at 615 holds value capture."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK, MARUTI, ONGC, VEDL, ITC, INDUSINDBK all attractive but stocks have already run hard intraday — chasing post-gap moves late in session at 1:38 PM is poor R:R. VEDL demerger eligibility is interesting but post-record-date price reset adds noise. ONGC up 6.6% but already 10% above consensus TP. INDUSINDBK 3.5x volume with dividend resumption is a setup to watch on a pullback to 880-890 zone. CEATLTD and GRSE already gapped up large — wait for consolidation.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio 50% deployed with +1.32% unrealized — good day. Priority is risk management: trailing 4 SLs to breakeven or above to lock gains. Existing 4 OPEN orders (BANDHANBNK, GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) already represent pending exposure — not stacking more entries. Rolling 5-day win rate of 14% is concerning; the right answer is fewer, higher-conviction entries with tighter risk, not more activity. With 1h 51m to close and most setups already extended, NO_ACTION on new entries is the disciplined call."
}
